title: Butt-weld equal (straight) pipe tees
source: ASME B16.9 equal tee: outer diameter + wall matched to the pipe DN. run_length = center-to-end x 2 (full run), branch_length = center-to-end (branch height from the run axis). Nominal only; a bored run with a bored branch, no weld bevel. Keyed by DN.
